name: Arrival
headline: Enter the world of Yappyverse
body: An anime short set in the Foxies Casino on the Las Vegas Strip of 2056 — neon heist, fox-eared cast, one lucky chip.

name: Craft
headline: Made with intent
body: Every detail serves anime and animation fans, 16-34.

name: World
headline: This is your space
body: Scroll deeper — the camera keeps moving.
